title: Void House

heroImage: 03-void-house.jpg
excerpt: "A brutalist staircase, shot at the precise moment its shadow aligns with the geometry."
---

Void House is a private residence designed by Studio Hara, completed in 2023. We were given complete access to document the interior across a single 72-hour window after final commissioning, before the family moved in.
